Short Fiction

Stories published in magazines, anthologies, and commissioned work. A partial list - I’ll update this as I remember things I’ve forgotten.

In magazines, journals, and commissioned work

StoryPublicationYearLink
The Limits of My LanguageGrimdark Magazine, issue #382024Link
Worrying over PotatoesGoogle Research / Wordcraft Writers Workshop2022Link
The Only Good DoctorsGoverningHealthFutures (The Lancet × Financial Times)2021Link
Work EthicsWired2020Link
The State MachineSlate / Future Tense (ASU)2020Link
The Slow Sad Suicide of Rohan WijeratneSelf-published; reprinted in Grimdark issue #442017Link

In anthologies

StoryAnthologyPublisherYearLink
The State MachineThe Big Book of CyberpunkVintage / Penguin Random House2023-
The Art of the PossibleKalicalypse: Subcontinental Science FictionFuture Fiction2022Link
ConfessorThe Gollancz Book of South Asian Science Fiction, Vol. 2Hachette India2021Link
A Little Bit of KaliThe Expanding Universe 6; reprinted Escape Pod #792-2019Escape Pod link
BeatnikChronicle Worlds: Crime and Punishment-2019Link
OzymandiasHorizons Beyond-2019-
The Tragedy of John MetcalfParallel Worlds: the Heroes Within-2019Link
Messenger (with R.R. Virdi)The Expanding Universe 5-2018-
The Writing ContestFuture Visions-2018-
Deep Ocean Blues2054-2018-
Claws and EffectHellcats Anthology-2018Link
DreadnoughtThe Expanding Universe 3-2017-

Messenger was nominated for the Nebula Award.

Collections

  • The Slow Sad Suicide of Rohan Wijeratne (Perera Hussein, 2024) - a print collection gathering many of the stories above.

Online and freely readable

Stories available to read right now, no paywall:

  • Work Ethics - Wired, 2020
  • The State Machine - Slate / Future Tense, 2020
  • A Little Bit of Kali - Escape Pod #792, audio narrated by Kaushik Narasimhan
  • Worrying over Potatoes - Google Research Wordcraft, 2022
  • The Only Good Doctors - Lancet × Financial Times, 2021

A note on finding things

Short fiction has a habit of going out of print or disappearing behind paywalls. If you’re looking for a specific story and can’t find it, get in touch - I may have a copy I can share for personal reading.

Back to top

To get in touch, reach out to hello [at] yudhanjaya [dot] com, or contact finegan [at] zenoagency [dot] com to talk to my agent (Stevie Finegan). Responses from my end may take time.

This site uses Just the Docs, a documentation theme for Jekyll.
